questions.domain: 領域 3：設計安全架構 (Design Secure Architectures)

question_text.zh: 解决方案架构师正在为公司的 AWS 账户设计 AWS Identity and Access Management (IAM) 授权模型。该公司已指定五名特定员工拥有对 AWS 账户中的 AWS 服务和资源的完全访问权限。解决方案架构师为五名指定员工每人创建了一个 IAM 用户，并创建了一个 IAM 用户组。哪种解决方案可以满足这些要求？
question_text.en: A solutions architect is designing an AWS Identity and Access Management (IAM) authorization model for a company's AWS account. The company has designated five specific employees to have full access to AWS services and resources in the AWS account. The solutions architect has created an IAM user for each of the five designated employees and has created an IAM user group. Which solution will meet these requirements?

A.zh: 将 AdministratorAccess 基于资源的策略附加到 IAM 用户组。将五个指定员工 IAM 用户分别放入 IAM 用户组中。
A.en: Attach the AdministratorAccess resource-based policy to the IAM user group. Place each of the five designated employee IAM users in the IAM user group.

B.zh: 将基于系统管理员身份的策略附加到 IAM 用户组。将五个指定员工 IAM 用户分别放入 IAM 用户组中。
B.en: Attach the SystemAdministrator identity-based policy to the IAM user group. Place each of the five designated employee IAM users in the IAM user group.

C.zh: 将 AdministratorAccess 基于身份的策略附加到 IAM 用户组。将五个指定员工 IAM 用户分别放入 IAM 用户组中。
C.en: Attach the AdministratorAccess identity-based policy to the IAM user group. Place each of the five designated employee IAM users in the IAM user group.

D.zh: 将 SystemAdministrator 基于资源的策略附加到 IAM 用户组。将五个指定员工 IAM 用户分别放入 IAM 用户组中。
D.en: Attach the SystemAdministrator resource-based policy to the IAM user group. Place each of the five designated employee IAM users in the IAM user group.

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：基于策略的资源（resource-basedpolicy）直接附加到资源上，而不是将用户附加到用户组或组上。 IAM 用户组无法根据策略使用资源。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Policy-based resources (resource-based policies) are attached directly to the resource, rather than users being attached to user groups or groups. IAM user groups cannot use resources based on policy.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因： AWS 中没有名为“SystemAdministrator”的预定义策略。该选项没有任何作用。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: There is no predefined policy named "SystemAdministrator" in AWS. This option has no effect.

C.zh: 正確。技术原因： AdministratorAccess 是 AWS 提供的预定义策略，用于授予完全访问权限。将此策略附加到 IAM 用户组并将用户添加到该组以满足问题要求。
C.en: Correct. Technical reason: AdministratorAccess is a predefined policy provided by AWS that grants full access. Attach this policy to the IAM Users group and add users to the group to meet the problem requirements.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：基于资源的策略无法附加到 IAM 用户组。另外，“SystemAdministrator”并不是AWS的预定义策略。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Resource-based policies cannot be attached to IAM user groups. In addition, "SystemAdministrator" is not a predefined policy of AWS.

answer_text.zh: C. 将 AdministratorAccess 基于身份的策略附加到 IAM 用户组。将五个指定员工 IAM 用户分别放入 IAM 用户组中。
answer_text.en: C. Attach the AdministratorAccess identity-based policy to the IAM user group. Place each of the five designated employee IAM users in the IAM user group.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果： C (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要： AdministratorAccess 是 AWS 提供的预定义策略，用于授予完全访问权限。将此策略附加到 IAM 用户组并将用户添加到该组以满足问题要求。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: C (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: AdministratorAccess is a predefined policy provided by AWS that grants full access. Attach this policy to the IAM Users group and add users to the group to meet the problem requirements.

questions.domain: 領域 2：設計高性能架構 (Design High-Performing Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司拥有基于虚拟机 (VM) 的多层支付处理应用程序。各层之间的通信通过第三方中间件解决方案异步进行，保证一次性交付。该公司需要一种需要最少基础设施管理的解决方案。该解决方案必须保证应用程序消息传递准确一次。哪种行动组合可以满足这些要求？ （选择两个。）
question_text.en: A company has a multi-tier payment processing application that is based on virtual machines (VMs). The communication between the tiers occurs asynchronously through a third-party middleware solution that guarantees exactly-once delivery. The company needs a solution that requires the least amount of infrastructure management. The solution must guarantee exactly- once delivery for application messaging. Which combination of actions will meet these requirements? (Choose two.)

A.zh: 将 AWS Lambda 用于架构中的计算层。
A.en: Use AWS Lambda for the compute layers in the architecture.

B.zh: 使用 Amazon EC2 实例作为架构中的计算层。
B.en: Use Amazon EC2 instances for the compute layers in the architecture.

C.zh: 使用 Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) 作为计算层之间的消息传递组件。
C.en: Use Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) as the messaging component between the compute layers.

D.zh: 使用 Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) FIFO 队列作为计算层之间的消息传递组件。
D.en: Use Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) FIFO queues as the messaging component between the compute layers.

E.zh: 使用基于 Amazon Elastic Kubernetes Service (Amazon EKS) 的容器作为架构中的计算层。
E.en: Use containers that are based on Amazon Elastic Kubernetes Service (Amazon EKS) for the compute layers in the architecture.

A.zh: 正確。技术原因： AWS Lambda 是一种无服务器计算服务，可以减少基础设施管理的需求，满足问题的“最少基础设施管理”要求。此外， Lambda 可以与 SQS FIFO 队列集成，以支持一次性交付。
A.en: Correct. Technical reason: AWS Lambda is a serverless computing service that reduces the need for infrastructure management, meeting the "minimal infrastructure management" requirement of the problem. Additionally, Lambda can be integrated with SQS FIFO queues to support exactly-once delivery.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因： EC2实例需要手动管理基础设施（例如操作系统、扩展、维护等），不满足问题中的“最低基础设施管理”要求。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: EC2 instances require manual management of infrastructure (such as operating system, scaling, maintenance, etc.) and do not meet the "minimum infrastructure management" requirement in the question.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因： Amazon SNS 是一种发布/订阅消息服务，不支持一次性传送。它提供的是“至少一次”消息传递，不符合要求。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Amazon SNS is a publish/subscribe messaging service and does not support exactly-once delivery. What it provides is "at least once" messaging, which does not meet the requirements.

D.zh: 正確。技术原因： Amazon SQS FIFO 队列支持一次性交付以满足问题要求。此外， SQS FIFO 队列可以与 Lambda 集成，以进一步减少基础设施管理需求。
D.en: Correct. Technical reason: Amazon SQS FIFO queue supports exactly-once delivery to meet the problem requirements. Additionally, SQS FIFO queues can be integrated with Lambda to further reduce infrastructure management needs.

E.zh: 錯誤。技术原因： Amazon EKS 需要管理容器编排和集群基础设施，这增加了管理复杂性，并且不满足问题的“最低基础设施管理”要求。
E.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Amazon EKS requires management of container orchestration and cluster infrastructure, which increases management complexity and does not meet the "minimum infrastructure management" requirements of the question.

answer_text.zh: A. 将 AWS Lambda 用于架构中的计算层。；D. 使用 Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) FIFO 队列作为计算层之间的消息传递组件。
answer_text.en: A. Use AWS Lambda for the compute layers in the architecture.; D. Use Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) FIFO queues as the messaging component between the compute layers.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果： AD (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要： AWS Lambda 是一种无服务器计算服务，可以减少基础设施管理的需求，满足问题的“最少基础设施管理”要求。此外， Lambda 可以与 SQS FIFO 队列集成，以支持一次性交付。； Amazon SQS FIFO 队列支持一次性交付以满足问题要求。此外， SQS FIFO 队列可以与 Lambda 集成，以进一步减少基础设施管理需求。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: AD (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: AWS Lambda is a serverless computing service that reduces the need for infrastructure management, meeting the "minimal infrastructure management" requirement of the problem. Additionally, Lambda can be integrated with SQS FIFO queues to support exactly-once delivery.; Amazon SQS FIFO queue supports exactly-once delivery to meet the problem requirements. Additionally, SQS FIFO queues can be integrated with Lambda to further reduce infrastructure management needs.

questions.domain: 領域 2：設計高性能架構 (Design High-Performing Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司有一个每晚批处理例程，用于分析本地文件系统每天通过 SFTP 接收的报告文件。该公司希望将解决方案迁移到 AWS 云。该解决方案必须具有高可用性和弹性。该解决方案还必须最大限度地减少运营工作量。哪种解决方案满足这些要求？
question_text.en: A company has a nightly batch processing routine that analyzes report files that an on-premises file system receives daily through SFTP. The company wants to move the solution to the AWS Cloud. The solution must be highly available and resilient. The solution also must minimize operational effort. Which solution meets these requirements?

A.zh: 部署 AWS Transfer for SFTP 和 Amazon Elastic File System (Amazon EFS) 文件系统进行存储。使用具有计划扩展策略的 Auto Scaling 组中的 Amazon EC2 实例来运行批处理操作。
A.en: Deploy AWS Transfer for SFTP and an Amazon Elastic File System (Amazon EFS) file system for storage. Use an Amazon EC2 instance in an Auto Scaling group with a scheduled scaling policy to run the batch operation.

B.zh: 部署运行 Linux 和 SFTP 服务的 Amazon EC2 实例。使用 Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS) 卷进行存储。使用 Auto Scaling 组，并将最小实例数和所需实例数设置为 1。
B.en: Deploy an Amazon EC2 instance that runs Linux and an SFTP service. Use an Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS) volume for storage. Use an Auto Scaling group with the minimum number of instances and desired number of instances set to 1.

C.zh: 部署运行 Linux 和 SFTP 服务的 Amazon EC2 实例。使用 Amazon Elastic File System (Amazon EFS) 文件系统进行存储。使用 Auto Scaling 组，并将最小实例数和所需实例数设置为 1。
C.en: Deploy an Amazon EC2 instance that runs Linux and an SFTP service. Use an Amazon Elastic File System (Amazon EFS) file system for storage. Use an Auto Scaling group with the minimum number of instances and desired number of instances set to 1.

D.zh: 部署 AWS Transfer for SFTP 和 Amazon S3 存储桶进行存储。修改应用程序以将批处理文件从 Amazon S3 拉取到 Amazon EC2 实例进行处理。使用具有计划扩展策略的 Auto Scaling 组中的 EC2 实例来运行批量操作。
D.en: Deploy AWS Transfer for SFTP and an Amazon S3 bucket for storage. Modify the application to pull the batch files from Amazon S3 to an Amazon EC2 instance for processing. Use an EC2 instance in an Auto Scaling group with a scheduled scaling policy to run the batch operation.

A.zh: 正確。技术原因：分析： AWS Transfer for SFTP 是一项托管服务，可以轻松接收 SFTP 文件，从而减少管理 SFTP 服务器的操作工作量。 Amazon EFS 是一种高度可用、弹性且可扩展的文件存储服务，适合存储批处理文件。使用 Auto Scaling 组和计划的扩展策略来确保批处理操作的高可用性和弹性。此选项满足问题要求：高可用性、灵活性和最小的操作工作量。
A.en: Correct. Technical reason: Analysis: AWS Transfer for SFTP is a managed service that makes it easy to receive SFTP files, reducing the operational effort of managing an SFTP server. Amazon EFS is a highly available, elastic, and scalable file storage service suitable for storing batch files. Use Auto Scaling groups and scheduled scaling strategies to ensure high availability and resiliency for batch processing operations. This option meets the problem requirements: high availability, flexibility and minimal operational effort.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：分析：运行SFTP服务需要手动管理EC2实例和SFTP服务器，增加了运维工作量。 Amazon EBS 是单实例存储，无法提供高可用性和弹性。 Auto Scaling组将最小实例数和期望实例数设置为1，无法实现弹性扩容。该选项不满足问题的要求：高可用性和最小的操作工作负载。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Analysis: Running SFTP services requires manual management of EC2 instances and SFTP servers, which increases the operation and maintenance workload. Amazon EBS is single-instance storage and cannot provide high availability and resiliency. The Auto Scaling group sets the minimum number of instances and the expected number of instances to 1, and cannot achieve elastic expansion. This option does not meet the requirements of the problem: high availability and minimal operational workload.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：分析：运行SFTP服务需要手动管理EC2实例和SFTP服务器，增加了运维工作量。 Amazon EFS 提供高可用性和弹性，但手动管理 SFTP 服务仍然是一个问题。 Auto Scaling组将最小实例数和期望实例数设置为1，无法实现弹性伸缩。此选项部分满足了问题的要求，但未能最大限度地减少操作工作量。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Analysis: Running SFTP services requires manual management of EC2 instances and SFTP servers, which increases the operation and maintenance workload. Amazon EFS provides high availability and resiliency, but manually managing the SFTP service remains a problem. Auto Scaling groups set the minimum and expected number of instances to 1 and cannot achieve elastic scaling. This option partially meets the requirements of the problem, but fails to minimize operational effort.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：分析： AWS Transfer for SFTP 是一项托管服务，可减少运营工作量。 Amazon S3 是一种高可用、弹性且低成本的存储服务，但需要修改应用程序以支持从 S3 拉取文件，这会增加开发工作量。使用 Auto Scaling 组和计划的扩展策略来确保批处理操作的高可用性和弹性。此选项满足高可用性和弹性要求，但会增加开发工作量，并且不能完全减少运营工作量。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Analysis: AWS Transfer for SFTP is a managed service that reduces operational effort. Amazon S3 is a highly available, elastic, and low-cost storage service, but applications need to be modified to support pulling files from S3, which increases development effort. Use Auto Scaling groups and scheduled scaling strategies to ensure high availability and resiliency for batch processing operations. This option meets high availability and resiliency requirements, but increases development effort and does not completely minimize operational effort.

answer_text.zh: A. 部署 AWS Transfer for SFTP 和 Amazon Elastic File System (Amazon EFS) 文件系统进行存储。使用具有计划扩展策略的 Auto Scaling 组中的 Amazon EC2 实例来运行批处理操作。
answer_text.en: A. Deploy AWS Transfer for SFTP and an Amazon Elastic File System (Amazon EFS) file system for storage. Use an Amazon EC2 instance in an Auto Scaling group with a scheduled scaling policy to run the batch operation.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果： A (77%) D (20%) 3%。热门讨论与考点摘要：分析： AWS Transfer for SFTP 是一项托管服务，可以轻松接收 SFTP 文件，从而减少管理 SFTP 服务器的操作工作量。 Amazon EFS 是一种高度可用、弹性且可扩展的文件存储服务，适合存储批处理文件。使用 Auto Scaling 组和计划的扩展策略来确保批处理操作的高可用性和弹性。此选项满足问题要求：高可用性、灵活性和最小的操作工作量。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: A (77%) D (20%) 3%. Popular discussion and key point summary: Analysis: AWS Transfer for SFTP is a managed service that makes it easy to receive SFTP files, reducing the operational effort of managing an SFTP server. Amazon EFS is a highly available, elastic, and scalable file storage service suitable for storing batch files. Use Auto Scaling groups and scheduled scaling strategies to ensure high availability and resiliency for batch processing operations. This option meets the problem requirements: high availability, flexibility and minimal operational effort.

questions.domain: 領域 3：設計安全架構 (Design Secure Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司在世界各地都有用户访问其部署在多个 AWS 区域的 Amazon EC2 实例上的基于 HTTP 的应用程序。该公司希望提高应用程序的可用性和性能。该公司还希望保护应用程序免受可能影响可用性、损送安全性或消耗过多资源的常见 Web 攻击。需要静态 IP 地址。解决方案架构师应该建议什么来实现这一目标？
question_text.en: A company has users all around the world accessing its HTTP-based application deployed on Amazon EC2 instances in multiple AWS Regions. The company wants to improve the availability and performance of the application. The company also wants to protect the application against common web exploits that may affect availability, compromise security, or consume excessive resources. Static IP addresses are required. What should a solutions architect recommend to accomplish this?

A.zh: 将 EC2 实例置于每个区域中的网络负载均衡器 (NLB) 后面。在 NLB 上部署 AWS WAF。使用 AWS Global Accelerator 创建加速器并将 NLB 注册为终端节点。
A.en: Put the EC2 instances behind Network Load Balancers (NLBs) in each Region. Deploy AWS WAF on the NLBs. Create an accelerator using AWS Global Accelerator and register the NLBs as endpoints.

B.zh: 将 EC2 实例置于每个区域中的应用程序负载均衡器 (ALB) 后面。在 ALB 上部署 AWS WAF。使用 AWS Global Accelerator 创建加速器并将 ALB 注册为终端节点。
B.en: Put the EC2 instances behind Application Load Balancers (ALBs) in each Region. Deploy AWS WAF on the ALBs. Create an accelerator using AWS Global Accelerator and register the ALBs as endpoints.

C.zh: 将 EC2 实例置于每个区域中的网络负载均衡器 (NLB) 后面。在 NLB 上部署 AWS WAF。创建 Amazon CloudFront 分配，其源使用 Amazon Route 53 基于延迟的路由将请求路由到 NLB。
C.en: Put the EC2 instances behind Network Load Balancers (NLBs) in each Region. Deploy AWS WAF on the NLBs. Create an Amazon CloudFront distribution with an origin that uses Amazon Route 53 latency-based routing to route requests to the NLBs.

D.zh: 将 EC2 实例置于每个区域中的应用程序负载均衡器 (ALB) 后面。创建一个 Amazon CloudFront 分配，其源使用 Amazon Route 53 基于延迟的路由将请求路由到 ALB。在 CloudFront 分配上部署 AWS WAF。
D.en: Put the EC2 instances behind Application Load Balancers (ALBs) in each Region. Create an Amazon CloudFront distribution with an origin that uses Amazon Route 53 latency-based routing to route requests to the ALBs. Deploy AWS WAF on the CloudFront distribution.

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：技术分析： NLB支持静态IP地址。 AWS Global Accelerator 可以提供全局加速和静态 IP 地址，但 NLB 不支持与 AWS WAF 直接集成。 AWS WAF 通常与 ALB 或 CloudFront 集成，因此此选项在安全性方面不合格。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Technical analysis: NLB supports static IP addresses. AWS Global Accelerator can provide global acceleration and static IP addresses, but NLB does not support direct integration with AWS WAF. AWS WAF is typically integrated with ALB or CloudFront, so this option does not qualify in terms of security.

B.zh: 正確。技术原因：技术分析： ALB支持与AWS WAF集成，可以保护应用程序免受常见网络攻击。 AWS Global Accelerator 提供静态 IP 地址和全球加速功能。此选项可满足所有需求，包括性能优化、安全性和静态 IP 地址。
B.en: Correct. Technical reason: Technical analysis: ALB supports integration with AWS WAF, which can protect applications from common network attacks. AWS Global Accelerator provides static IP addresses and global acceleration capabilities. This option meets all needs, including performance optimization, security, and static IP addresses.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：技术分析： NLB不支持与AWS WAF直接集成，因此不满足安全要求。此外， CloudFront 分发和 Route 53 的延迟路由可以优化性能，但无法提供静态 IP 地址。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Technical Analysis: NLB does not support direct integration with AWS WAF and therefore does not meet security requirements. Additionally, CloudFront distribution and Route 53's deferred routing can optimize performance but cannot provide static IP addresses.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：技术分析： CloudFront可以与AWS WAF集成提供安全保护，但CloudFront无法提供静态IP地址。另外， Route 53的延迟路由可以优化性能，但无法满足静态IP地址的需求。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Technical analysis: CloudFront can integrate with AWS WAF to provide security protection, but CloudFront cannot provide static IP addresses. In addition, Route 53's delayed routing can optimize performance, but it cannot meet the needs of static IP addresses.

answer_text.zh: B. 将 EC2 实例置于每个区域中的应用程序负载均衡器 (ALB) 后面。在 ALB 上部署 AWS WAF。使用 AWS Global Accelerator 创建加速器并将 ALB 注册为终端节点。
answer_text.en: B. Put the EC2 instances behind Application Load Balancers (ALBs) in each Region. Deploy AWS WAF on the ALBs. Create an accelerator using AWS Global Accelerator and register the ALBs as endpoints.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果： B (85%) D (15%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：技术分析： ALB支持与AWS WAF集成，可以保护应用程序免受常见网络攻击。 AWS Global Accelerator 提供静态 IP 地址和全球加速功能。此选项可满足所有需求，包括性能优化、安全性和静态 IP 地址。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: B (85%) D (15%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Technical analysis: ALB supports integration with AWS WAF, which can protect applications from common network attacks. AWS Global Accelerator provides static IP addresses and global acceleration capabilities. This option meets all needs, including performance optimization, security, and static IP addresses.

questions.domain: 領域 1：設計彈性架構 (Design Resilient Architectures)

question_text.zh: 某公司的数据平台使用Amazon Aurora MySQL数据库。该数据库具有跨不同可用区的多个只读副本和多个数据库实例。用户最近报告了数据库错误，表明连接过多。该公司希望将只读副本提升为主写入器时将故障转移时间减少 20%。哪种解决方案可以满足这个要求？
question_text.en: A company’s data platform uses an Amazon Aurora MySQL database. The database has multiple read replicas and multiple DB instances across different Availability Zones. Users have recently reported errors from the database that indicate that there are too many connections. The company wants to reduce the failover time by 20% when a read replica is promoted to primary writer. Which solution will meet this requirement?

A.zh: 通过多可用区集群部署从 Aurora 切换到 Amazon RDS。
A.en: Switch from Aurora to Amazon RDS with Multi-AZ cluster deployment.

B.zh: 在 Aurora 数据库前面使用 Amazon RDS 代理。
B.en: Use Amazon RDS Proxy in front of the Aurora database.

C.zh: 切换到带有 DynamoDB Accelerator (DAX) 的 Amazon DynamoDB 进行读取连接。
C.en: Switch to Amazon DynamoDB with DynamoDB Accelerator (DAX) for read connections.

D.zh: 切换到具有重定位功能的 Amazon Redshift。
D.en: Switch to Amazon Redshift with relocation capability.

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因： Amazon Aurora 本身已经支持高可用性和多可用区部署，切换到 Amazon RDS 不会显著减少停机时间。此外， Aurora 通常优于 RDS，切换到 RDS 可能会降低整体性能。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Amazon Aurora already supports high availability and multi-AZ deployments natively, and switching to Amazon RDS will not significantly reduce downtime. Additionally, Aurora typically outperforms RDS, and switching to RDS may reduce overall performance.

B.zh: 正確。技术原因： Amazon RDS Proxy 可以管理数据库连接池，以减少连接过多的问题。 RDS Proxy 还优化了故障转移时间，因为它在数据库故障转移期间保持连接稳定。
B.en: Correct. Technical reason: Amazon RDS Proxy can manage database connection pools to reduce the problem of too many connections. RDS Proxy also optimizes failover time as it keeps connections stable during database failover.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因： DynamoDB 是一种 NoSQL 数据库，与 Aurora 的关系数据库架构完全不同。切换到DynamoDB需要重新设计应用架构，并不能直接解决当前问题。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: DynamoDB is a NoSQL database that is completely different from Aurora's relational database architecture. Switching to DynamoDB requires a redesign of the application architecture and does not directly solve the current problem.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因： Amazon Redshift 是一种数据仓库解决方案，主要针对分析工作负载而不是事务数据库而设计。切换到 Redshift 并不能解决 Aurora 数据库的连接问题或故障转移时间问题。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Amazon Redshift is a data warehouse solution designed primarily for analytical workloads rather than transactional databases. Switching to Redshift does not resolve connectivity issues or failover time issues with your Aurora database.

answer_text.zh: B. 在 Aurora 数据库前面使用 Amazon RDS 代理。
answer_text.en: B. Use Amazon RDS Proxy in front of the Aurora database.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果： B (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要： Amazon RDS Proxy 可以管理数据库连接池，以减少连接过多的问题。 RDS Proxy 还优化了故障转移时间，因为它在数据库故障转移期间保持连接稳定。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: B (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Amazon RDS Proxy can manage database connection pools to reduce the problem of too many connections. RDS Proxy also optimizes failover time as it keeps connections stable during database failover.

questions.domain: 領域 2：設計高性能架構 (Design High-Performing Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司将文本文件存储在 Amazon S3 中。文本文件包括客户聊天消息、日期和时间信息以及客户个人身份信息 (PII)。该公司需要一个解决方案来向外部服务提供商提供对话样本以进行质量控制。外部服务提供商需要随机挑选样本对话，直到最近的对话。公司不得与外部服务提供商共享客户 PII。当客户对话数量增加时，解决方案必须进行扩展。哪种解决方案能够以最少的运营开销满足这些要求？
question_text.en: A company stores text files in Amazon S3. The text files include customer chat messages, date and time information, and customer personally identifiable information (PII). The company needs a solution to provide samples of the conversations to an external service provider for quality control. The external service provider needs to randomly pick sample conversations up to the most recent conversation. The company must not share the customer PII with the external service provider. The solution must scale when the number of customer conversations increases. Which solution will meet these requirements with the LEAST operational overhead?

A.zh: 创建对象 Lambda 访问点。创建一个 AWS Lambda 函数，该函数在读取文件时编辑 PII。指示外部服务提供商访问对象 Lambda 访问点。
A.en: Create an Object Lambda Access Point. Create an AWS Lambda function that redacts the PII when the function reads the file. Instruct the external service provider to access the Object Lambda Access Point.

B.zh: 在 Amazon EC2 实例上创建一个 Web 应用程序，该应用程序显示文件列表、从文件中编辑 PII，并允许外部服务提供商下载已编辑 PII 的文件的新版本。
B.en: Create a web application on an Amazon EC2 instance that presents a list of the files, redacts the PII from the files, and allows the external service provider to download new versions of the files that have the PII redacted.

D.zh: 创建 Amazon DynamoDB 表。创建一个 AWS Lambda 函数，该函数仅读取不包含 PII 的文件中的数据。配置 Lambda 函数以在将新文件写入 Amazon S3 时将非 PII 数据存储在 DynamoDB 表中。授予外部服务提供商对 DynamoDB 表的访问权限。
D.en: Create an Amazon DynamoDB table. Create an AWS Lambda function that reads only the data in the files that does not contain PII. Configure the Lambda function to store the non-PII data in the DynamoDB table when a new file is written to Amazon S3. Grant the external service provider access to the DynamoDB table.

A.zh: 正確。技术原因：分析： Object Lambda Access Point 允许在访问 S3 对象时动态修改数据，适合实时编辑 PII。 AWS Lambda 可以轻松实现数据处理逻辑，无需额外的存储或复杂的操作。该方案的操作开销较低，因为不需要额外的存储或定期批处理。该方案完全满足随机访问、PII保护和可扩展性等要求。
A.en: Correct. Technical reason: Analysis: Object Lambda Access Point allows dynamic modification of data when accessing S3 objects, and is suitable for editing PII in real time. AWS Lambda can easily implement data processing logic without requiring additional storage or complex operations. This scheme has low operational overhead since no additional storage or periodic batch processing is required. The scheme fully meets the requirements, including random access, PII protection and scalability.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：分析：使用EC2实例进行批量处理需要额外的计算资源和管理开销。定期读取和处理文件可能会导致无法实时满足外部服务提供商的需求。该方案的运行开销较高，不满足问题所要求的“LEAST运行开销”。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Analysis: Using EC2 instances for batch processing requires additional computing resources and management overhead. Reading and processing files on a regular basis may result in the inability to meet the needs of external service providers in real time. The running overhead of this solution is high and does not meet the "LEAST running overhead" required by the problem.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：分析：将数据存储到 DynamoDB 表中需要额外的存储资源和管理开销。该方案无法直接满足外部服务商随机访问S3文件的需求。该方案的运行开销较高，不满足问题所要求的“LEAST运行开销”。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Analysis: Storing data into DynamoDB tables requires additional storage resources and management overhead. This solution cannot directly meet the needs of external service providers for random access to S3 files. The running overhead of this solution is high and does not meet the "LEAST running overhead" required by the problem.

answer_text.zh: A. 创建对象 Lambda 访问点。创建一个 AWS Lambda 函数，该函数在读取文件时编辑 PII。指示外部服务提供商访问对象 Lambda 访问点。
answer_text.en: A. Create an Object Lambda Access Point. Create an AWS Lambda function that redacts the PII when the function reads the file. Instruct the external service provider to access the Object Lambda Access Point.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果： A (94%) 6%。热门讨论与考点摘要：分析： Object Lambda Access Point 允许在访问 S3 对象时动态修改数据，适合实时编辑 PII。 AWS Lambda 可以轻松实现数据处理逻辑，无需额外的存储或复杂的操作。该方案的操作开销较低，因为不需要额外的存储或定期批处理。该方案完全满足随机访问、PII保护和可扩展性等要求。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: A (94%) 6%. Popular discussion and key point summary: Analysis: Object Lambda Access Point allows dynamic modification of data when accessing S3 objects, and is suitable for editing PII in real time. AWS Lambda can easily implement data processing logic without requiring additional storage or complex operations. This scheme has low operational overhead since no additional storage or periodic batch processing is required. The scheme fully meets the requirements, including random access, PII protection and scalability.

questions.domain: 領域 1：設計彈性架構 (Design Resilient Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司正在 Amazon EC2 实例上运行旧系统。应用代码不能修改，系统不能运行在多个实例上。解决方案架构师必须设计一个有弹性的解决方案，可以缩短系统的恢复时间。解决方案架构师应该建议什么来满足这些要求？
question_text.en: A company is running a legacy system on an Amazon EC2 instance. The application code cannot be modified, and the system cannot run on more than one instance. A solutions architect must design a resilient solution that can improve the recovery time for the system. What should the solutions architect recommend to meet these requirements?

A.zh: 为 EC2 实例启用终止保护。
A.en: Enable termination protection for the EC2 instance.

B.zh: 配置 EC2 实例以进行多可用区部署。
B.en: Configure the EC2 instance for Multi-AZ deployment.

C.zh: 创建 Amazon CloudWatch 警报以在发生故障时恢复 EC2 实例。
C.en: Create an Amazon CloudWatch alarm to recover the EC2 instance in case of failure.

D.zh: 启动具有两个 Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS) 卷的 EC2 实例，这些卷使用 RAID 配置来实现存储冗余。
D.en: Launch the EC2 instance with two Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS) volumes that use RAID configurations for storage redundancy.

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：停止保护可以防止实例被意外删除，但不会提高实例的弹性或减少恢复时间。此选项与问题所要求的“增加恢复时间”无关，因此是错误的。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Stopping protection prevents an instance from being accidentally deleted but does not improve the instance's resilience or reduce recovery time. This option has nothing to do with "increasing recovery time" as the question asks for, and is therefore wrong.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因： EC2 实例本身不支持多可用区部署。多可用区通常用于托管 RDS 等服务，而不是单个 EC2 实例。这个选项在技术上是不可能的，因此是错误的。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: EC2 instances do not natively support Multi-AZ deployment. Multi-AZ is typically used to host services such as RDS rather than a single EC2 instance. This option is technically impossible and therefore wrong.

C.zh: 正確。技术原因： CloudWatch可以控制EC2实例的状态，并在实例发生故障时触发自动恢复操作。这个选项符合题目要求，可以提高痉挛的恢复时间，所以是正确的。
C.en: Correct. Technical reason: CloudWatch can control the status of EC2 instances and trigger automatic recovery operations in the event of instance failure. This option meets the question requirements and can improve the recovery time of spasms, so it is correct.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因： RAID配置可以提高存储冗余，但仅解决存储层的可靠性问题，并不能提高EC2实例的恢复时间。此选项与问题所要求的“增加恢复时间”无关，因此是错误的。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: RAID configuration can improve storage redundancy, but it only solves the reliability problem of the storage layer and cannot improve the recovery time of EC2 instances. This option has nothing to do with "increasing recovery time" as the question asks for, and is therefore wrong.

answer_text.zh: C. 创建 Amazon CloudWatch 警报以在发生故障时恢复 EC2 实例。
answer_text.en: C. Create an Amazon CloudWatch alarm to recover the EC2 instance in case of failure.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果： C (58%) D (42%)。热门讨论与考点摘要： CloudWatch可以控制EC2实例的状态，并在实例发生故障时触发自动恢复操作。这个选项符合题目要求，可以提高痉挛的恢复时间，所以是正确的。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: C (58%) D (42%). Popular discussion and key point summary: CloudWatch can control the status of EC2 instances and trigger automatic recovery operations in the event of instance failure. This option meets the question requirements and can improve the recovery time of spasms, so it is correct.

questions.domain: 領域 1：設計彈性架構 (Design Resilient Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司希望将其容器化应用程序工作负载部署到跨三个可用区的 VPC。该公司需要一个跨可用区高度可用的解决方案。该解决方案必须需要对应用程序进行最少的更改。哪种解决方案能够以最少的运营开销满足这些要求？
question_text.en: A company wants to deploy its containerized application workloads to a VPC across three Availability Zones. The company needs a solution that is highly available across Availability Zones. The solution must require minimal changes to the application. Which solution will meet these requirements with the LEAST operational overhead?

A.zh: 使用 Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS)。配置 Amazon ECS Service Auto Scaling 以使用目标跟踪扩展。将最小容量设置为 3。将任务放置策略类型设置为通过可用区属性进行传播。
A.en: Use Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS). Configure Amazon ECS Service Auto Scaling to use target tracking scaling. Set the minimum capacity to 3. Set the task placement strategy type to spread with an Availability Zone attribute.

B.zh: 使用 Amazon Elastic Kubernetes Service (Amazon EKS) 自管理节点。配置 Application Auto Scaling 以使用目标跟踪扩展。将最小容量设置为 3。
B.en: Use Amazon Elastic Kubernetes Service (Amazon EKS) self-managed nodes. Configure Application Auto Scaling to use target tracking scaling. Set the minimum capacity to 3.

C.zh: 使用 Amazon EC2 预留实例。在分散置放组中启动三个 EC2 实例。配置 Auto Scaling 组以使用目标跟踪扩展。将最小容量设置为 3。
C.en: Use Amazon EC2 Reserved Instances. Launch three EC2 instances in a spread placement group. Configure an Auto Scaling group to use target tracking scaling. Set the minimum capacity to 3.

D.zh: 使用 AWS Lambda 函数。配置 Lambda 函数以连接到 VPC。配置 Application Auto Scaling 以使用 Lambda 作为可扩展目标。将最小容量设置为 3。
D.en: Use an AWS Lambda function. Configure the Lambda function to connect to a VPC. Configure Application Auto Scaling to use Lambda as a scalable target. Set the minimum capacity to 3.

A.zh: 正確。技术原因：分析： Amazon ECS 是 AWS 的托管容器服务，支持跨可用区的高可用性。通过配置Service Auto Scaling和任务放置策略，您可以确保任务均匀分布在多个可用区以实现高可用性。最小容量设置为 3，确保每个可用区至少运行一项任务。此选项需要最少的应用程序修改，并且操作开销较低。正确的选项。
A.en: Correct. Technical reason: Analysis: Amazon ECS is AWS’s managed container service that supports high availability across Availability Zones. By configuring Service Auto Scaling and task placement policies, you can ensure that tasks are evenly distributed across multiple Availability Zones for high availability. Minimum capacity is set to 3, ensuring at least one task is running per Availability Zone. This option requires minimal application modifications and has low operational overhead. Correct option.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：分析： Amazon EKS 是 AWS 提供的托管 Kubernetes 服务，支持容器化应用程序的部署。使用自管理节点需要额外的运维工作，如节点管理、更新等，增加了运营开销。虽然可以实现高可用性，但 EKS 比 ECS 更复杂，并且需要更多的应用程序配置修改。错误的选择。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Analysis: Amazon EKS is a managed Kubernetes service provided by AWS that supports the deployment of containerized applications. Using self-managed nodes requires additional operation and maintenance work, such as node management and updates, which increases operational overhead. While high availability can be achieved, EKS is more complex than ECS and requires more application configuration modifications. Wrong choice.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：分析： EC2预留实例提供固定计算资源，但不具备容器化应用的管理功能。分散置放组可以实现跨可用区的分布，但需要手动管理容器部署，增加了运营开销。此选项需要对应用程序进行更多修改，并且不满足最低应用程序修改要求。错误的选择。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Analysis: EC2 reserved instances provide fixed computing resources, but do not have the management functions for containerized applications. Dispersed placement groups can achieve distribution across availability zones, but require manual management of container deployment, which increases operational overhead. This option requires more modifications to the application and does not meet the Minimum Application Modification requirements. Wrong choice.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：分析： AWS Lambda 是一种无服务器计算服务，适合事件驱动的应用程序，但不适合容器化工作负载的部署。虽然可以连接VPC，但Lambda的伸缩机制并不能完全满足容器化应用的需求。此选项需要对应用程序进行重大修改，并且与问题要求不符。错误的选择。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Analysis: AWS Lambda is a serverless computing service suitable for event-driven applications, but not suitable for the deployment of containerized workloads. Although it is possible to connect to a VPC, Lambda's scaling mechanism does not fully meet the needs of containerized applications. This option requires significant modifications to the application and is not consistent with the question requirements. Wrong choice.

answer_text.zh: A. 使用 Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS)。配置 Amazon ECS Service Auto Scaling 以使用目标跟踪扩展。将最小容量设置为 3。将任务放置策略类型设置为通过可用区属性进行传播。
answer_text.en: A. Use Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS). Configure Amazon ECS Service Auto Scaling to use target tracking scaling. Set the minimum capacity to 3. Set the task placement strategy type to spread with an Availability Zone attribute.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果： A (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：分析： Amazon ECS 是 AWS 的托管容器服务，支持跨可用区的高可用性。通过配置Service Auto Scaling和任务放置策略，您可以确保任务均匀分布在多个可用区以实现高可用性。最小容量设置为 3，确保每个可用区至少运行一项任务。此选项需要最少的应用程序修改，并且操作开销较低。正确的选项。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: A (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Analysis: Amazon ECS is AWS’s managed container service that supports high availability across Availability Zones. By configuring Service Auto Scaling and task placement policies, you can ensure that tasks are evenly distributed across multiple Availability Zones for high availability. Minimum capacity is set to 3, ensuring at least one task is running per Availability Zone. This option requires minimal application modifications and has low operational overhead. Correct option.

questions.domain: 領域 1：設計彈性架構 (Design Resilient Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家媒体公司将电影存储在 Amazon S3 中。每部电影都存储在一个大小从 1 GB 到 10 GB 的视频文件中。公司必须能够在用户购买后 5 分钟内提供电影的流媒体内容。 20年以内的电影的需求高于20年以上的电影。该公司希望根据需求最大限度地降低托管服务成本。哪种解决方案可以满足这些要求？
question_text.en: A media company stores movies in Amazon S3. Each movie is stored in a single video file that ranges from 1 GB to 10 GB in size. The company must be able to provide the streaming content of a movie within 5 minutes of a user purchase. There is higher demand for movies that are less than 20 years old than for movies that are more than 20 years old. The company wants to minimize hosting service costs based on demand. Which solution will meet these requirements?

A.zh: 将所有媒体内容存储在 Amazon S3 中。当电影需求减少时，使用 S3 生命周期策略将媒体数据移至不频繁访问层。
A.en: Store all media content in Amazon S3. Use S3 Lifecycle policies to move media data into the Infrequent Access tier when the demand for a movie decreases.

B.zh: 将较新的电影视频文件存储在 S3 标准中。将较旧的电影视频文件存储在 S3 标准-IA (S3 标准-IA) 中。当用户订购旧电影时，使用标准检索来检索视频文件。
B.en: Store newer movie video files in S3 Standard. Store older movie video files in S3 Standard-infrequent Access (S3 Standard- IA). When a user orders an older movie, retrieve the video file by using standard retrieval.

C.zh: 将较新的电影视频文件存储在 S3 智能分层中。将较旧的电影视频文件存储在 S3 Glacier 灵活检索中。当用户订购旧电影时，使用加急检索来检索视频文件。
C.en: Store newer movie video files in S3 Intelligent-Tiering. Store older movie video files in S3 Glacier Flexible Retrieval. When a user orders an older movie, retrieve the video file by using expedited retrieval.

D.zh: 将较新的电影视频文件存储在 S3 标准中。将较旧的电影视频文件存储在 S3 Glacier 灵活检索中。当用户订购旧电影时，使用批量检索来检索视频文件。
D.en: Store newer movie video files in S3 Standard. Store older movie video files in S3 Glacier Flexible Retrieval. When a user orders an older movie, retrieve the video file by using bulk retrieval.

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：新旧电影的存储需求没有显著差异，不满足问题中的成本优化要求。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: There is no significant difference in storage requirements between new and old movies, which does not satisfy the cost optimization requirement in the problem.

B.zh: 正確。技术原因：满足主体要求的成本优化和检验时间要求。
B.en: Correct. Technical reason: Meet cost optimization and inspection time requirements required by the subject.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因： S3 GlacierFlexible Retrieval加急检查的成本较高，且题目要求“成本优化”，因此该选项不符合要求。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: The cost of expedited inspection of S3 GlacierFlexible Retrieval is high, and the question requires "cost optimization", so this option does not meet the requirements.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：该解决方案不能同时满足问题的关键性能、可用性、安全性、成本或操作约束，因此不是最佳选择。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This solution does not simultaneously satisfy the critical performance, availability, security, cost, or operational constraints of the problem and is therefore not the best choice.

answer_text.zh: B. 将较新的电影视频文件存储在 S3 标准中。将较旧的电影视频文件存储在 S3 标准-IA (S3 标准-IA) 中。当用户订购旧电影时，使用标准检索来检索视频文件。
answer_text.en: B. Store newer movie video files in S3 Standard. Store older movie video files in S3 Standard-infrequent Access (S3 Standard- IA). When a user orders an older movie, retrieve the video file by using standard retrieval.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果： B (56%) C (35%) 9%。热门讨论与考点摘要：满足主体要求的成本优化和检验时间要求。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: B (56%) C (35%) 9%. Popular discussion and key point summary: Meet cost optimization and inspection time requirements required by the subject.

questions.domain: 領域 1：設計彈性架構 (Design Resilient Architectures)

question_text.zh: 解决方案架构师需要为供应商作为 Docker 容器映像提供的应用程序设计架构。容器需要 50 GB 可用于临时文件的存储空间。基础设施必须是无服务器的。哪种解决方案能够以最少的运营开销满足这些要求？
question_text.en: A solutions architect needs to design the architecture for an application that a vendor provides as a Docker container image. The container needs 50 GB of storage available for temporary files. The infrastructure must be serverless. Which solution meets these requirements with the LEAST operational overhead?

A.zh: 创建一个 AWS Lambda 函数，该函数使用 Docker 容器映像以及具有超过 50 GB 空间的 Amazon S3 安装卷。
A.en: Create an AWS Lambda function that uses the Docker container image with an Amazon S3 mounted volume that has more than 50 GB of space.

B.zh: 创建一个 AWS Lambda 函数，该函数将 Docker 容器映像与空间超过 50 GB 的 Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS) 卷结合使用。
B.en: Create an AWS Lambda function that uses the Docker container image with an Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS) volume that has more than 50 GB of space.

C.zh: 创建使用 AWS Fargate 启动类型的 Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) 集群。使用 Amazon Elastic File System (Amazon EFS) 卷为容器映像创建任务定义。使用该任务定义创建服务。
C.en: Create an Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) cluster that uses the AWS Fargate launch type. Create a task definition for the container image with an Amazon Elastic File System (Amazon EFS) volume. Create a service with that task definition.

D.zh: 创建一个 Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) 集群，该集群使用 Amazon EC2 启动类型以及空间超过 50 GB 的 Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS) 卷。为容器映像创建任务定义。使用该任务定义创建服务。
D.en: Create an Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) cluster that uses the Amazon EC2 launch type with an Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS) volume that has more than 50 GB of space. Create a task definition for the container image. Create a service with that task definition.

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因： AWS Lambda 不支持直接挂载 Amazon S3 作为存储卷。 S3是对象存储，不能直接用作文件系统。另外， Lambda的临时存储空间限制为512MB，无法满足50GB的要求。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: AWS Lambda does not support directly mounting Amazon S3 as a storage volume. S3 is object storage and cannot be used directly as a file system. In addition, Lambda's temporary storage space is limited to 512MB, which cannot meet the 50GB requirement.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因： AWS Lambda 不支持挂载 Amazon EBS 卷。 EBS 卷只能与 EC2 实例或某些容器服务（例如 ECS）一起使用。同样， Lambda的临时存储空间限制为512MB，不满足50GB的要求。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: AWS Lambda does not support mounting Amazon EBS volumes. EBS volumes can only be used with EC2 instances or certain container services such as ECS. Likewise, Lambda's temporary storage space is limited to 512MB, which doesn't meet the 50GB requirement.

C.zh: 正確。技术原因： AWS Fargate 是一种无服务器容器运行服务，满足问题的“无服务器”要求。 Amazon EFS can provide over 50 GB of storage and can be mounted into containers and used as a file system.由于 Fargate 不需要管理底层 EC2 实例，因此运营开销较低。
C.en: Correct. Technical reason: AWS Fargate is a serverless container running service that meets the "serverless" requirements of the problem. Amazon EFS can provide over 50 GB of storage and can be mounted into containers and used as a file system. Because Fargate does not need to manage the underlying EC2 instances, operational overhead is lower.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：尽管 Amazon EC2 启动类型可以使用 EBS 卷来满足 50 GB 存储要求，但 EC2 启动类型需要管理底层 EC2 实例，这会增加运营开销。不符合问题要求的“无服务器”架构。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Although the Amazon EC2 launch type can use EBS volumes to meet the 50 GB storage requirement, the EC2 launch type requires management of the underlying EC2 instances, which increases operational overhead. A "serverless" architecture that doesn't meet the requirements of the question.

answer_text.zh: C. 创建使用 AWS Fargate 启动类型的 Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) 集群。使用 Amazon Elastic File System (Amazon EFS) 卷为容器映像创建任务定义。使用该任务定义创建服务。
answer_text.en: C. Create an Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) cluster that uses the AWS Fargate launch type. Create a task definition for the container image with an Amazon Elastic File System (Amazon EFS) volume. Create a service with that task definition.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果： C (95%) 5%。热门讨论与考点摘要： AWS Fargate 是一种无服务器容器运行服务，满足问题的“无服务器”要求。 Amazon EFS can provide over 50 GB of storage and can be mounted into containers and used as a file system.由于 Fargate 不需要管理底层 EC2 实例，因此运营开销较低。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: C (95%) 5%. Popular discussion and key point summary: AWS Fargate is a serverless container running service that meets the "serverless" requirements of the problem. Amazon EFS can provide over 50 GB of storage and can be mounted into containers and used as a file system. Because Fargate does not need to manage the underlying EC2 instances, operational overhead is lower.

questions.domain: 領域 3：設計安全架構 (Design Secure Architectures)

question_text.zh: 公司需要使用其本地 LDAP 目录服务向 AWS 管理控制台验证其用户身份。目录服务与安全断言标记语言 (SAML) 不兼容。哪种解决方案满足这些要求？
question_text.en: A company needs to use its on-premises LDAP directory service to authenticate its users to the AWS Management Console. The directory service is not compatible with Security Assertion Markup Language (SAML). Which solution meets these requirements?

A.zh: 在 AWS 和本地 LDAP 之间启用 AWS IAM Identity Center（AWS Single Sign-On）。
A.en: Enable AWS IAM Identity Center (AWS Single Sign-On) between AWS and the on-premises LDAP.

B.zh: 创建使用 AWS 凭证的 IAM 策略，并将该策略集成到 LDAP 中。
B.en: Create an IAM policy that uses AWS credentials, and integrate the policy into LDAP.

C.zh: 设置一个流程，以便在 LDAP 凭证更新时轮换 IAM 凭证。
C.en: Set up a process that rotates the IAM credentials whenever LDAP credentials are updated.

D.zh: 开发使用 AWS Security Token Service (AWS STS) 获取短期凭证的本地自定义身份代理应用程序或流程。
D.en: Develop an on-premises custom identity broker application or process that uses AWS Security Token Service (AWS STS) to get short-lived credentials.

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因： AWS IAM Identity Center (AWS Single Sign-On) 要求身份提供商支持 SAML 或其他兼容协议，并且该问题明确指出 LDAP 不支持 SAML。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: AWS IAM Identity Center (AWS Single Sign-On) requires that the identity provider supports SAML or another compatible protocol, and the question specifically states that LDAP does not support SAML.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因： IAM 策略用于定义权限，而不是身份验证。将 IAM 策略直接集成到 LDAP 中并不能解决身份验证问题。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: IAM policies are used to define permissions, not authentication. Integrating IAM policies directly into LDAP does not solve the authentication problem.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：轮换 IAM 凭证并不能解决身份验证问题，也不能解决用户需要通过 LDAP 进行身份验证才能访问 AWS 管理控制台的问题。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Rotating IAM credentials does not solve the authentication problem, nor does it solve the problem of users needing to authenticate through LDAP to access the AWS Management Console.

D.zh: 正確。技术原因：开发一个自定义身份代理应用程序，充当桥梁，将 LDAP 的身份验证结果转换为 AWS STS 的短期凭证，从而允许用户访问 AWS 管理控制台。
D.en: Correct. Technical reason: Develop a custom identity broker application that acts as a bridge to convert the authentication results from LDAP into short-lived credentials for AWS STS, allowing users to access the AWS Management Console.

answer_text.zh: D. 开发使用 AWS Security Token Service (AWS STS) 获取短期凭证的本地自定义身份代理应用程序或流程。
answer_text.en: D. Develop an on-premises custom identity broker application or process that uses AWS Security Token Service (AWS STS) to get short-lived credentials.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果： D (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：开发一个自定义身份代理应用程序，充当桥梁，将 LDAP 的身份验证结果转换为 AWS STS 的短期凭证，从而允许用户访问 AWS 管理控制台。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: D (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Develop a custom identity broker application that acts as a bridge to convert the authentication results from LDAP into short-lived credentials for AWS STS, allowing users to access the AWS Management Console.

questions.domain: 領域 1：設計彈性架構 (Design Resilient Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司在 AWS 账户中存储多个 Amazon 机器映像 (AMI) 以启动其 Amazon EC2 实例。 AMI 包含公司运营所需的关键数据和配置。该公司希望实施一种解决方案，能够快速高效地恢复意外删除的 AMI。哪种解决方案能够以最少的运营开销满足这些要求？
question_text.en: A company stores multiple Amazon Machine Images (AMIs) in an AWS account to launch its Amazon EC2 instances. The AMIs contain critical data and configurations that are necessary for the company’s operations. The company wants to implement a solution that will recover accidentally deleted AMIs quickly and efficiently. Which solution will meet these requirements with the LEAST operational overhead?

A.zh: 创建 AMI 的 Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS) 快照。将快照存储在单独的 AWS 账户中。
A.en: Create Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS) snapshots of the AMIs. Store the snapshots in a separate AWS account.

B.zh: 定期将所有 AMI 复制到另一个 AWS 账户。
B.en: Copy all AMIs to another AWS account periodically.

C.zh: 在回收站中创建保留规则。
C.en: Create a retention rule in Recycle Bin.

D.zh: 将 AMI 上传到具有跨区域复制的 Amazon S3 存储桶。
D.en: Upload the AMIs to an Amazon S3 bucket that has Cross-Region Replication.

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：虽然 EBS 快照可以备份数据，但它们并不是 AMI 的直接备份解决方案。 Storing snapshots in another account increases management complexity, and restoring the AMI requires additional steps.
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: While EBS snapshots can back up data, they are not a direct backup solution for AMIs. Storing snapshots in another account increases management complexity, and restoring the AMI requires additional steps.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：定期将 AMI 复制到另一个账户确实可以提供备份，但这需要额外的脚本或手动操作，增加了运营开销，并且不满足“最低运营开销”要求。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Periodically copying the AMI to another account does provide backup, but this requires additional scripting or manual action, adds operational overhead, and does not meet the LEAST operational overhead requirement.

C.zh: 正確。技术原因：回收站是AWS提供的一种资源保护机制。 It can set retention rules for AMI to prevent accidental deletion.该方法自动化程度高，运行开销最低。
C.en: Correct. Technical reason: The recycle bin is a resource protection mechanism provided by AWS. It can set retention rules for AMI to prevent accidental deletion. This method has a high degree of automation and the lowest operating overhead.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：将 AMI 上传到 S3 并启用跨区域复制需要额外的转换步骤（例如导出 AMI），并且 S3 不是 AMI 的本地存储解决方案，这使恢复变得复杂。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Uploading an AMI to S3 and enabling cross-region replication requires additional conversion steps (such as exporting the AMI), and S3 is not a native storage solution for AMIs, which complicates recovery.

answer_text.zh: C. 在回收站中创建保留规则。
answer_text.en: C. Create a retention rule in Recycle Bin.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果： C (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：回收站是AWS提供的一种资源保护机制。 It can set retention rules for AMI to prevent accidental deletion.该方法自动化程度高，运行开销最低。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: C (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: The recycle bin is a resource protection mechanism provided by AWS. It can set retention rules for AMI to prevent accidental deletion. This method has a high degree of automation and the lowest operating overhead.

questions.domain: 領域 4：設計成本優化架構 (Design Cost-Optimized Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司在本地存储了 150 TB 的归档图像数据，需要在下个月内将其迁移到 AWS 云。该公司当前的网络连接仅在夜间允许高达 100 Mbps 的上传速度。移动这些数据并满足迁移期限的最具成本效益的机制是什么？
question_text.en: A company has 150 TB of archived image data stored on-premises that needs to be moved to the AWS Cloud within the next month. The company’s current network connection allows up to 100 Mbps uploads for this purpose during the night only. What is the MOST cost-effective mechanism to move this data and meet the migration deadline?

A.zh: 使用 AWS Snowmobile 将数据发送到 AWS。
A.en: Use AWS Snowmobile to ship the data to AWS.

B.zh: 订购多个 AWS Snowball 设备以将数据发送到 AWS。
B.en: Order multiple AWS Snowball devices to ship the data to AWS.

C.zh: 启用 Amazon S3 传输加速并安全上传数据。
C.en: Enable Amazon S3 Transfer Acceleration and securely upload the data.

D.zh: 创建 Amazon S3 VPC 终端节点并建立 VPN 以上传数据。
D.en: Create an Amazon S3 VPC endpoint and establish a VPN to upload the data.

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因： AWS Snowmobile is suitable for very large-scale data migration (such as petabyte level), but this problem only has 150TB of data. The cost of using a snowmobile is too high to be practical.
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: AWS Snowmobile is suitable for very large-scale data migration (such as petabyte level), but this problem only has 150TB of data. The cost of using a snowmobile is too high to be practical.

B.zh: 正確。技术原因： AWS Snowball 是一种经济高效的 TB 级数据迁移解决方案。 Multiple Snowball devices can meet the migration needs of 150TB of data and can be completed within one month.
B.en: Correct. Technical reason: AWS Snowball is a cost-effective solution for terabyte-scale data migration. Multiple Snowball devices can meet the migration needs of 150TB of data and can be completed within one month.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因： Amazon S3 Transfer Acceleration 可以加快数据上传速度，但受限于当前网络连接（100 Mbps），无法在一个月内完成 150 TB 数据的迁移。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Amazon S3 Transfer Acceleration can speed up data uploads, but is limited by the current network connection (100 Mbps) and cannot complete the migration of 150 TB of data in one month.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：使用VPN上传数据仍受到网络带宽（100Mbps）的限制，无法满足1个月内完成迁移的要求。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Using VPN to upload data is still limited by network bandwidth (100Mbps) and cannot meet the requirement to complete the migration within 1 month.

answer_text.zh: B. 订购多个 AWS Snowball 设备以将数据发送到 AWS。
answer_text.en: B. Order multiple AWS Snowball devices to ship the data to AWS.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果： B (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要： AWS Snowball 是一种经济高效的 TB 级数据迁移解决方案。 Multiple Snowball devices can meet the migration needs of 150TB of data and can be completed within one month.
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: B (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: AWS Snowball is a cost-effective solution for terabyte-scale data migration. Multiple Snowball devices can meet the migration needs of 150TB of data and can be completed within one month.

questions.domain: 領域 2：設計高性能架構 (Design High-Performing Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司希望将其三层应用程序从本地迁移到 AWS。 Web 层和应用程序层在第三方虚拟机 (VM) 上运行。数据库层运行在 MySQL 上。该公司需要通过对架构进行尽可能少的更改来迁移应用程序。该公司还需要一个可以将数据恢复到特定时间点的数据库解决方案。哪种解决方案能够以最少的运营开销满足这些要求？
question_text.en: A company wants to migrate its three-tier application from on premises to AWS. The web tier and the application tier are running on third-party virtual machines (VMs). The database tier is running on MySQL. The company needs to migrate the application by making the fewest possible changes to the architecture. The company also needs a database solution that can restore data to a specific point in time. Which solution will meet these requirements with the LEAST operational overhead?

A.zh: 将 Web 层和应用程序层迁移到私有子网中的 Amazon EC2 实例。将数据库层迁移到私有子网中的 Amazon RDS for MySQL。
A.en: Migrate the web tier and the application tier to Amazon EC2 instances in private subnets. Migrate the database tier to Amazon RDS for MySQL in private subnets.

B.zh: 将 Web 层迁移到公有子网中的 Amazon EC2 实例。将应用程序层迁移到私有子网中的 EC2 实例。将数据库层迁移到私有子网中的 Amazon Aurora MySQL。
B.en: Migrate the web tier to Amazon EC2 instances in public subnets. Migrate the application tier to EC2 instances in private subnets. Migrate the database tier to Amazon Aurora MySQL in private subnets.

C.zh: 将 Web 层迁移到公有子网中的 Amazon EC2 实例。将应用程序层迁移到私有子网中的 EC2 实例。将数据库层迁移到私有子网中的 Amazon RDS for MySQL。
C.en: Migrate the web tier to Amazon EC2 instances in public subnets. Migrate the application tier to EC2 instances in private subnets. Migrate the database tier to Amazon RDS for MySQL in private subnets.

D.zh: 将 Web 层和应用程序层迁移到公有子网中的 Amazon EC2 实例。将数据库层迁移到公有子网中的 Amazon Aurora MySQL。
D.en: Migrate the web tier and the application tier to Amazon EC2 instances in public subnets. Migrate the database tier to Amazon Aurora MySQL in public subnets.

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：技术分析：将Web层和用户层迁移到私有子网会导致Web层无法通过互联网直接访问，这违反了Web层一般需要公开访问的原则。将数据库层迁移到 Amazon RDS for MySQL 是正确的选择，因为它支持时间点恢复功能。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Technical analysis: Migrating the Web layer and user layer to a private subnet will result in the Web layer not being directly accessible through the Internet, which violates the principle that the Web layer generally needs to be publicly accessible. Migrating the database layer to Amazon RDS for MySQL is the right choice because it supports point-in-time recovery capabilities.

B.zh: 正確。技术原因：技术分析：将Web层迁移到公共子网是正确的，因为Web层需要可公开访问。将冷层迁移到私有子网是正确的，因为冷层通常不需要直接公共访问。将数据库层迁移到 Amazon Aurora MySQL 是正确的选择，因为 Aurora 支持时间点恢复功能，并且专为高性能和高可用性而构建。
B.en: Correct. Technical reason: Technical analysis: Migrating the web tier to a public subnet is correct because the web tier needs to be publicly accessible. Migrating the cold tier to a private subnet is correct because the cold tier typically does not require direct public access. Migrating the database tier to Amazon Aurora MySQL is the right choice because Aurora supports point-in-time recovery capabilities and is built for high performance and high availability.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：技术分析：将Web层迁移到公共子网是正确的，因为Web层需要可公开访问。 Migrating the cold tier to a private subnet is correct because the cold tier typically does not require direct public access.将数据库层迁移到 Amazon RDS for MySQL 是正确的选择，因为它支持时间点恢复功能。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Technical analysis: Migrating the web tier to a public subnet is correct because the web tier needs to be publicly accessible. Migrating the cold tier to a private subnet is correct because the cold tier typically does not require direct public access. Migrating the database layer to Amazon RDS for MySQL is the right choice because it supports point-in-time recovery capabilities.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因： Technical analysis: Migrating the web tier to a public subnet is correct because the web tier needs to be publicly accessible.将用户层移至公共子网是一个错误，因为用户层通常不需要直接公共访问，应放置在私有子网中以增加安全性。将数据库层迁移到公共子网是一个错误，因为数据库层应放置在私有子网中以增加安全性。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Technical analysis: Migrating the web tier to a public subnet is correct because the web tier needs to be publicly accessible. Moving the user layer to a public subnet is a mistake because the user layer generally does not require direct public access and should be placed in a private subnet for added security. Migrating the database layer to a public subnet is a mistake because the database layer should be placed in a private subnet for added security.

answer_text.zh: B. 将 Web 层迁移到公有子网中的 Amazon EC2 实例。将应用程序层迁移到私有子网中的 EC2 实例。将数据库层迁移到私有子网中的 Amazon Aurora MySQL。
answer_text.en: B. Migrate the web tier to Amazon EC2 instances in public subnets. Migrate the application tier to EC2 instances in private subnets. Migrate the database tier to Amazon Aurora MySQL in private subnets.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果： B (82%) C (18%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：技术分析：将Web层迁移到公共子网是正确的，因为Web层需要可公开访问。将冷层迁移到私有子网是正确的，因为冷层通常不需要直接公共访问。将数据库层迁移到 Amazon Aurora MySQL 是正确的选择，因为 Aurora 支持时间点恢复功能，并且专为高性能和高可用性而构建。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: B (82%) C (18%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Technical analysis: Migrating the web tier to a public subnet is correct because the web tier needs to be publicly accessible. Migrating the cold tier to a private subnet is correct because the cold tier typically does not require direct public access. Migrating the database tier to Amazon Aurora MySQL is the right choice because Aurora supports point-in-time recovery capabilities and is built for high performance and high availability.

questions.domain: 領域 3：設計安全架構 (Design Secure Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一个开发团队正在与另一家公司合作创建集成产品。另一家公司需要访问开发团队账户中包含的 Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) 队列。另一家公司希望在不放弃自己的账户权限的情况下轮询队列。解决方案架构师应如何提供对 SQS 队列的访问？
question_text.en: A development team is collaborating with another company to create an integrated product. The other company needs to access an Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) queue that is contained in the development team's account. The other company wants to poll the queue without giving up its own account permissions to do so. How should a solutions architect provide access to the SQS queue?

A.zh: 创建一个实例配置文件，为其他公司提供对 SQS 队列的访问权限。
A.en: Create an instance profile that provides the other company access to the SQS queue.

B.zh: 创建一个 IAM 策略，为其他公司提供对 SQS 队列的访问权限。
B.en: Create an IAM policy that provides the other company access to the SQS queue.

C.zh: 创建 SQS 访问策略，为其他公司提供对 SQS 队列的访问权限。
C.en: Create an SQS access policy that provides the other company access to the SQS queue.

D.zh: 创建 Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) 访问策略，为其他公司提供对 SQS 队列的访问权限。
D.en: Create an Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) access policy that provides the other company access to the SQS queue.

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：实例配置文件无法直接向其他账户提供对 SQS 队列的访问。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Instance profiles cannot directly provide access to SQS queues to other accounts.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因： IAM 策略无法直接提供对其他账户的跨账户访问。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: IAM policies cannot directly provide cross-account access to other accounts.

C.zh: 正確。技术原因：这是解决这个问题需求的正确方法，因为SQS访问策略支持跨账户权限管理。
C.en: Correct. Technical reason: This is the right way to solve this problem requirement because SQS access policies support cross-account permission management.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因： SNS 访问策略无法向其他账户提供对 SQS 队列的访问。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: SNS access policies cannot provide access to SQS queues to other accounts.

answer_text.zh: C. 创建 SQS 访问策略，为其他公司提供对 SQS 队列的访问权限。
answer_text.en: C. Create an SQS access policy that provides the other company access to the SQS queue.
